requirement_topic.en: CE Marking — Multi-Directive Framework for Air-source Heat Pumps (Netherlands / ACM Enforcement)
requirement_topic.zh: CE标志——空气源热泵的多指令框架（荷兰 / ACM执法）
requirement_topic.zht: CE標誌——空氣源熱泵的多指令框架（荷蘭 / ACM執法）

summary.en: Air-source heat pumps placed on the Dutch market require CE marking under multiple directives simultaneously: (1) Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU for electrical safety; (2) EMC Directive 2014/30/EU for electromagnetic compatibility; (3) Ecodesign Regulation (EU) 813/2013 (mandatory compliance, blocking market placement for non-compliant products); (4) Pressure Equipment Directive 2014/68/EU for refrigerant pressure circuits meeting pressure/volume thresholds (Category II+ requires Notified Body); (5) F-gas Regulation (EU) 2024/573 (refrigerant restrictions apply independently of CE marking). The Netherlands implements CE marking enforcement through ACM (Autoriteit Consument en Markt). A single EU Declaration of Conformity must cover all applicable directives. CE marking must appear on the product, packaging, and documentation. Dutch consumer protection law additionally requires documentation in Dutch.
summary.zh: 投放荷兰市场的空气源热泵需同时依据多项指令取得CE标志：（1）低压指令2014/35/EU（电气安全）；（2）电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU（电磁兼容性）；（3）生态设计法规（EU）813/2013（强制合规，不合规产品禁止市场投放）；（4）压力设备指令2014/68/EU（当制冷剂压力回路满足压力/容积阈值时适用，第II类及以上须引入公告机构）；（5）氟化气体法规（EU）2024/573（制冷剂限制独立于CE标志适用）。荷兰通过ACM（消费者与市场管理局）执行CE标志要求。单一欧盟符合性声明须涵盖所有适用指令。CE标志须标注于产品、包装及文件。荷兰消费者保护法还额外要求文件以荷兰语提供。
summary.zht: 投放荷蘭市場的空氣源熱泵需同時依據多項指令取得CE標誌：（1）低壓指令2014/35/EU（電氣安全）；（2）電磁相容指令2014/30/EU（電磁相容性）；（3）生態設計法規（EU）813/2013（強制合規，不合規產品禁止市場投放）；（4）壓力設備指令2014/68/EU（當制冷劑壓力迴路滿足壓力/容積閾值時適用，第II類及以上須引入公告機構）；（5）氟化氣體法規（EU）2024/573（制冷劑限制獨立於CE標誌適用）。荷蘭通過ACM（消費者與市場管理局）執行CE標誌要求。單一歐盟符合性聲明須涵蓋所有適用指令。CE標誌須標注於產品、包裝及文件。荷蘭消費者保護法還額外要求文件以荷蘭語提供。

summary.en: CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA, covers safety and EMC for domestic appliances in China. CCC does not have an Ecodesign equivalent, an F-gas refrigerant restriction equivalent, or a pressure equipment category/Notified Body system equivalent to PED. The CCC mark is not recognised in the Netherlands or the EU and cannot substitute CE marking.
summary.zh: 由中国国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）管理的中国强制性产品认证（CCC）涵盖中国国内家用电器的安全和电磁兼容。CCC没有等同于生态设计要求、氟化气体制冷剂限制或PED压力设备类别/公告机构体系的制度。CCC标志在荷兰或欧盟不被认可，不能替代CE标志。
summary.zht: 由中國國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）管理的中國強制性產品認證（CCC）涵蓋中國國內家用電器的安全和電磁相容。CCC沒有等同於生態設計要求、氟化氣體制冷劑限制或PED壓力設備類別/公告機構體系的制度。CCC標誌在荷蘭或歐盟不被認可，不能替代CE標誌。

gap.en: CCC certification does not substitute CE marking. Separate EU conformity assessment under each applicable directive is required. The multi-directive nature of heat pump CE marking (LVD + EMC + Ecodesign + PED) means that a Chinese manufacturer must address each directive independently, compile a Technical File, and issue an EU Declaration of Conformity. Dutch-specific gap: ACM actively monitors CE marking compliance; Documentation in Dutch is additionally required under NL consumer law; F-gas and STEK requirements add further NL-specific obligations beyond standard EU CE marking.
gap.zh: CCC认证不能替代CE标志。需针对每项适用指令进行独立的欧盟合规评估。热泵CE标志的多指令性质（低压指令+EMC指令+生态设计+PED）意味着中国制造商须独立处理每项指令，编制技术文件，并出具欧盟符合性声明。荷兰特定差距：ACM积极监测CE标志合规情况；NL消费者法还额外要求提供荷兰语文件；F-gas和STEK要求在标准欧盟CE标志之外增加了荷兰特定义务。
gap.zht: CCC認證不能替代CE標誌。需針對每項適用指令進行獨立的歐盟合規評估。熱泵CE標誌的多指令性質（低壓指令+EMC指令+生態設計+PED）意味著中國製造商須獨立處理每項指令，編制技術文件，並出具歐盟符合性聲明。荷蘭特定差距：ACM積極監測CE標誌合規情況；NL消費者法還額外要求提供荷蘭語文件；F-gas和STEK要求在標準歐盟CE標誌之外增加了荷蘭特定義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (CE marking required for NL/EU market placement; ACM enforces; Dutch documentation required)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (CCC required for domestic market; not equivalent to CE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — CCC certification does not substitute CE marking; separate EU conformity assessment under each applicable directive (LVD, EMC, Ecodesign, PED) required; F-gas compliance mandatory and separate; Dutch-specific additions: ACM market surveillance, Dutch-language documentation, STEK technician certification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——CCC认证不能替代CE标志；需针对每项适用指令（低压指令、EMC指令、生态设计、PED）进行独立的欧盟合规评估；氟化气体合规为强制性且需单独处理；荷兰特定附加要求：ACM市场监督、荷兰语文件、STEK技术人员认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——CCC認證不能替代CE標誌；需針對每項適用指令（低壓指令、EMC指令、生態設計、PED）進行獨立的歐盟合規評估；氟化氣體合規為強制性且需單獨處理；荷蘭特定附加要求：ACM市場監督、荷蘭語文件、STEK技術人員認證。

requirement_topic.en: Notified Body Requirements — PED Category II and Above (Netherlands Registered Bodies)
requirement_topic.zh: 公告机构要求——PED第II类及以上（荷兰注册机构）
requirement_topic.zht: 公告機構要求——PED第II類及以上（荷蘭注冊機構）

summary.en: For heat pump refrigerant circuits classified as PED Category II or higher, a Notified Body (NB) must be involved in the conformity assessment. The NB issues an EC Type Examination Certificate or approves the manufacturer's Quality Assurance system. The EU list of Notified Bodies is maintained on the NANDO database. Netherlands-registered Notified Bodies for PED include DEKRA Certification B.V. and Kiwa N.V. (TÜV-accredited). ILT is the competent authority for PED market surveillance in the Netherlands and cooperates with NANDO-listed bodies.
summary.zh: 对于被分类为PED第II类或更高类别的热泵制冷剂回路，公告机构（NB）必须参与合规评估。公告机构颁发EC型式检验证书或批准制造商的质量保证体系。欧盟公告机构名单在NANDO数据库维护。荷兰注册的PED公告机构包括DEKRA Certification B.V.和Kiwa N.V.（TÜV认可）。ILT是荷兰PED市场监督的主管机构，并与NANDO列明机构合作。
summary.zht: 對於被分類為PED第II類或更高類別的熱泵制冷劑迴路，公告機構（NB）必須參與合規評估。公告機構頒發EC型式檢驗證書或批准製造商的質量保證體系。歐盟公告機構名單在NANDO數據庫維護。荷蘭注冊的PED公告機構包括DEKRA Certification B.V.和Kiwa N.V.（TÜV認可）。ILT是荷蘭PED市場監督的主管機構，並與NANDO列明機構合作。

standards_or_laws: ILT (Inspectie Leefomgeving en Transport) — NL competent authority

summary.en: For pressure vessels requiring registration in China, a designated special equipment inspection body (特种设备检验机构) issues an inspection certificate under the SAMR/SELO framework. The Chinese inspection certificate and SELO registration are not recognised as equivalent to EU Notified Body certification or EC Type Examination under PED. No Chinese inspection body is NANDO-listed for PED purposes.
summary.zh: 对于中国境内须进行注册的压力容器，经国家市监总局/特检院认定的特种设备检验机构颁发检验证书。中国检验证书和SELO注册与欧盟公告机构认证或PED下的EC型式检验不等效。没有中国检验机构在NANDO数据库中以PED为目的进行列明。
summary.zht: 對於中國境內須進行登記的壓力容器，經國家市監總局/特檢院認定的特種設備檢驗機構頒發檢驗證書。中國檢驗證書和SELO登記與歐盟公告機構認證或PED下的EC型式檢驗不等效。沒有中國檢驗機構在NANDO數據庫中以PED為目的進行列明。

standards_or_laws: Special Equipment Safety Law of the PRC (2013)

gap.en: Chinese SELO inspection certificates and special equipment inspection body certificates are not recognised as equivalent to EU Notified Body involvement under PED. For PED Category II+ heat pump systems destined for the Netherlands, a NANDO-listed Notified Body (e.g. DEKRA or Kiwa in the Netherlands, or any other NANDO-listed NB) must be engaged. The NB's identification number must appear on the CE marking declaration. ILT may audit this during market surveillance.
gap.zh: 中国特检院检验证书和特种设备检验机构证书与欧盟PED下的公告机构参与不等效。对于面向荷兰的PED第II类及以上热泵系统，须引入NANDO列明的公告机构（如荷兰的DEKRA或Kiwa，或任何其他NANDO列明的公告机构）。公告机构的标识号须出现在CE标志声明中。ILT可在市场监督期间对此进行审查。
gap.zht: 中國特檢院檢驗證書和特種設備檢驗機構證書與歐盟PED下的公告機構參與不等效。對於面向荷蘭的PED第II類及以上熱泵系統，須引入NANDO列明的公告機構（如荷蘭的DEKRA或Kiwa，或任何其他NANDO列明的公告機構）。公告機構的標識號須出現在CE標誌聲明中。ILT可在市場監督期間對此進行審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for PED Category II and above (Notified Body involvement required by law; ILT audits in the Netherlands)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for applicable pressure vessels (designated inspection body under SAMR/SELO)

source.publisher: European Commission — NANDO (New Approach Notified and Designated Organisations)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — Chinese SELO inspection certificates not recognised; EU Notified Body (NANDO-listed, e.g. DEKRA or Kiwa NL) mandatory for PED Category II+ systems; ILT may audit compliance during NL market surveillance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——中国特检院检验证书不被认可；PED第II类及以上系统须引入欧盟公告机构（NANDO列明，如DEKRA或Kiwa荷兰）；ILT可在荷兰市场监督期间审查合规情况。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——中國特檢院檢驗證書不被認可；PED第II類及以上系統須引入歐盟公告機構（NANDO列明，如DEKRA或Kiwa荷蘭）；ILT可在荷蘭市場監督期間審查合規情況。
